purpose: Track minimized agent-surface repros without preserving report source context.

fixtures.followUp: Keep interface method generic binders independent from interface type parameters.
Keep self-recursive generic call targets present in the direct backend function table.
Keep direct generic specialization names from silently resolving to unrelated concrete functions.

Keep compiler structure budgets enforced for file size, strcmp growth, large functions, and stdlib signature parity until one standard-library signature and capability source replaces duplicated metadata.
Keep target-aware backend blockers before emission and keep backend diagnostics target-correct.
